channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: How important are the Gulf economies to the world?
item.description: Impact of US-Israeli war on Iran poses serious risks beyond energy sector.

item.title: Israel attacks major industrial and nuclear sites in Iran
item.description: Smoke was seen rising from Iran’s Arak heavy-water plant following Israeli air strikes on key infrastructure.

item.title: Drone reveals extent of Iranian missile damage in Israeli city of Arad
item.description: Drone footage has revealed the extent of damage in Arad days after an Iranian missile attack.

item.title: Smoke rises over Beirut suburbs after massive Israeli airstrike
item.description: Smoke rose over the skyline of Beirut following airstrikes as Israel continued to escalate its war on Hezbollah.

item.title: Rubio: US expects Iran war to end in ‘weeks, not months’
item.description: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio said the US expects its military operation in Iran to conclude in weeks, not months.

item.title: US diplomat Marco Rubio denounces settler violence, tolls in Hormuz strait
item.description: Rubio reiterated President Donald Trump's call for other countries to participate in securing the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: How close is the US to a quagmire in Iran?
item.description: The US has a 15-point plan to end the war on Iran, but what does the military reality show?

item.title: Iran’s football team honours children killed in Minab school airstrike
item.description: Iranian football players laid backpacks on a football pitch in Turkey to pay tribute to the children killed in a US-Isra

item.title: FBI director Kash Patel’s emails, photos hacked by Iran-linked group
item.description: The vigilante group Handala Hack Team said that it had successfully gained access to Patel's personal email account.

item.title: Is Europe heading to an energy crisis?
item.description: Europe is bracing for a supply crunch and a price shock as the Iran conflict drags on.
